data.title: New TV series "Beyond the Bridges" on REAL Shows Network showcases Pittsburgh's real estate and lifestyle, highlighting local people, neighborhoods, and businesses. Hosted by Tara Sill.
data.description: A new locally produced series fronted by Tara Sill is shining a spotlight on the individuals, communities, and enterprises that shape Pittsburgh. On February 21, 2026, REAL Shows Network (RSN), a television network focused on showcasing real estate and lifestyle narratives across the country, introduced Beyond...

data.title: Discover key issues surrounding Trump's tariffs in wake of Supreme Court ruling. Stay tuned for updates.
data.description: Washington and the business sector are reeling after the Supreme Court's decision regarding the president's tariffs. The impact of this ruling is significant as it has sent shockwaves through both spheres. Moving forward, it will be crucial to closely monitor any developments that come as a result of this decision.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures focus on Nvidia after market spike due to Trump tariff ruling. S&P 500 recovers 50-day line amid market volatility.
data.description: After a period of fluctuations, the S&P 500 has reclaimed its 50-day moving average. However, the market remains volatile and challenging to navigate. Investors are monitoring Nvidia closely following a positive stock market response to the recent tariff ruling under the Trump administration. Market participants are observing Dow Jones Futures for further indications of market trends.

data.title: AnorTech grants stock options to purchase 5,150,000 shares at $0.10 each to directors, employees, and consultants; options vest over 18 months and have a term of 5 years.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on Feb. 21, 2026, AnorTech Inc. ("AnorTech" or the "Company") (TSX Venture Exchange "ANOR"; OTCQB "ANORF") announced the issuance of incentive stock options under its stock option plan. A total of 5,150,000 shares are being offered to directors, employees, and consultants at $0.10 per share. These options will vest over 18 months and will be valid for five years, in accordance with TSX Venture Exchange regulations.

data.title: Major tech companies like Meta and Alphabet are ramping up lobbying efforts, spending heavily on ads and hiring more lobbyists to influence policy decisions.
data.description: Major technology companies such as Meta and Alphabet are significantly increasing their expenditure on eye-catching billboard advertisements, targeting undecided politicians and expanding their team of lobbyists.

data.title: Bitcoin's digital signature security is at risk due to quantum computing advances. Developers address threat at ETH Denver.
data.description: During the recent ETH Denver event, developers expressed concerns about the potential threat quantum computing poses to Bitcoin's digital signatures. The industry is actively discussing strategies to address this issue as quantum computing advances.ETH Denver participants highlighted the evolving debate around safeguarding Bitcoin's digital signatures from quantum computing advancements.

data.title: Five diverse stocks including two AI stocks and Ralph Lauren are near buy points, attracting investor interest.
data.description: Five stocks from a variety of sectors, including consumer, artificial intelligence, infrastructure, healthcare, and space industries, are being closely monitored for potential investment opportunities. Among these stocks, two are AI companies, while Ralph Lauren represents the consumer sector. The overall interest in these stocks is evident, indicating potential growth and promising buy points for investors.

data.title: IoTeX reports 'suspicious activity' with token safe, containing losses. Working on tracing funds with exchanges due to potential key breach.
data.description: IoTeX is currently investigating suspected irregularities associated with a token safe and is collaborating with exchanges to track funds following analysts' findings linking the situation to a potential compromise of a private key.

data.title: Long-term study shows TREMFYA® yields 80% clinical remission, 50% endoscopic remission at 3 years in ulcerative colitis.
data.description: In a recent long-term extension study called QUASAR, it was found that over 80% of individuals receiving TREMFYA® treatment achieved clinical remission. Additionally, more than 50% of participants reached endoscopic remission by Week 140. This highlights the effectiveness of TREMFYA® in providing lasting disease control. Out of the patients, 78% experienced intestinal healing at both tissue and...

data.title: NNAAL linked to higher rates of NICU admission, preterm birth, eclampsia for mothers and infants.
data.description: A recent study conducted in Milwaukee revealed that mothers with a non-narcotic analgesics allergy label (NNAAL) face higher rates of NICU admissions, preterm births, and eclampsia. These mothers and their infants are more likely to experience adverse outcomes compared to those without the allergy label. The findings, released on Feb. 21, 2026, highlight the significant impact of NNAAL on maternal and infant health.

data.title: University of Phoenix appoints Yurandol Thompson as Associate Dean for Counseling, bringing expertise to role.
data.description: Yurandol Thompson, Ph.D., LPC, brings a wealth of experience in operations and programmatic effectiveness to the position of Associate Dean of Counseling at the University of Phoenix. The appointment was made in January 2026 in Phoenix.

data.title: After Christine Lagarde leaves, the future of crypto in Europe remains uncertain as her successors share her skepticism.
data.description: The current president of the European Central Bank, Christine Lagarde, holds a cautious stance on cryptocurrencies. However, the expected future leaders also do not show much support for digital currencies.

data.title: UK SMEs favor QuickBooks as top HMRC-compliant software per Expert Consumers; Feb 2026 report reveals.
data.description: As per a recent Expert Consumers article, a significant number of small and medium enterprises in the UK consider QuickBooks as a top HMRC compliant accounting platform. The report emphasizes the growing trend of businesses assessing accounting software for their needs.

data.title: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP investigates claims for Beta Bionics investors. Contact James Wilson for losses in stock/options.
data.description: Securities Litigation Partner James (Josh) Wilson from Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is urging investors who experienced substantial losses in Beta Bionics to reach out to him directly for a consultation. If you suffered significant financial setbacks related to Beta Bionics stocks or options, you are encouraged to contact him to explore potential courses of action.

data.title: GitHub offers organization-level metrics in public preview for Copilot, providing admins visibility without enterprise access.
data.description: The public preview of GitHub Copilot now includes organization-level usage metrics, providing org admins with direct visibility into usage data without the need for enterprise-level access. This feature allows organizations to track important numbers and gain insights into their Copilot usage at a more granular level.

data.title: Dmitry Druzhinsky sees Olympic arena as space for Kazakhstan and Ukraine to overcome challenges. 2026 Winter Olympics in Milan and Cortina d'Ampezzo symbolize renewal of global sport. Games are more than a race for medals, representing resilience and strategic sports development.
data.description: The 2026 Winter Olympics held in Milan and Cortina d'Ampezzo stand as a prime example of the revitalization of international sports, illustrating that the Games extend beyond mere medal pursuits. The event, which took place in February 2026, showcased resilience, character, and the deliberate fostering of national sports. These Olympics signified a significant milestone for global sports, emphasizing values and strategic sports development.

data.title: Antier launches white-label crypto exchange for UAE & MENA, VARA-compliant, targets financial institutions.
data.description: In recent news from New Delhi on February 21, 2026, leading company Antier has introduced a white label crypto exchange software that is VARA-compliant. This software is specifically tailored for financial institutions looking to penetrate the regulated digital-asset markets in the UAE and the broader MENA region. Aligned with Dubai's Virtual Asset Regulatory standards, this software provides a solution for institutions aiming to participate in this burgeoning sector. It caters to the growing demand for secure and compliant platforms and can potentially benefit various stakeholders. This move signifies Antier's strategic approach towards supporting institutional involvement in digital assets and aligning with regulatory frameworks, underscoring the importance of compliance in the rapidly evolving crypto industry landscape.

data.title: Abivax presents anti-fibrotic activity of Obefazimod at ECCO 2026, highlighting new clinical efficacy and safety analyses.
data.description: At ECCO 2026, Abivax revealed initial findings showcasing the anti-fibrotic effects of Obefazimod, combined with fresh evaluations on clinical effectiveness and safety in treating inflammatory bowel disease. The presentation highlighted significant progress, with promising results indicating Obefazimod's potential impact on fibrosis. This development marks a crucial advancement in the ongoing fight against inflammatory bowel disease, with key details outlined during the conference to provide a comprehensive overview.

data.title: India faces challenges in purchasing Russian oil due to pressure from heavy tariffs. Rejection may be awkward after complying.
data.description: The Prime Minister of India agreed to a significant number of President Trump's requests due to the imposition of high tariffs. It would be difficult to backtrack on these concessions at this point.

data.title: Feb 2026: QuickBooks named top bookkeeping tool for UK businesses by Better Business Advice, enhancing financial management.
data.description: In a recent report released on February 21, 2026, Better Business Advice reviewed the digital bookkeeping tools utilized by UK businesses in 2025. The assessment emphasized QuickBooks as a top choice for small and medium-sized enterprises due to its effectiveness in financial management and ensuring adherence to regulatory requirements. The report underscores the significance of digital solutions like QuickBooks in facilitating efficient operations within the UK business landscape.
